definition: Consciousness arising dependent on tongue and taste.
notes: The project prefers tongue-consciousness because it matches the canonical pattern and stays readable. Gustatory consciousness is acceptable in explanatory prose when the technical modality is the point.

context_rules.context: In most analytical and source-facing contexts
In explanatory prose emphasizing the sensory modality

example_phrases.pali: jivhañca paṭicca rase ca uppajjati jivhāviññāṇaṃ
example_phrases.translation: dependent on the tongue and tastes, tongue-consciousness arises
